title: The Great Flash Loan
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: donateToReserves() called immediately after flash loan
monitoring_rules: BLOCK tx if FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> donateToReserves() in same tx
summary: This article discusses flash loan exploits but does not detail specific incidents. However, it highlights the importance of monitoring flash loans followed by actions like donating to reserves.
